data.name: RLSS: Real-time, Decentralized, Cooperative, Networkless Multi-Robot Trajectory Planning using Linear Spatial Separations

data.description: RLSS: Real-time, Decentralized, Cooperative, Networkless Multi-Robot Trajectory Planning using Linear Spatial Separations is based on Model Predictive Control (MPC).
RLSS: Real-time, Decentralized, Cooperative, Networkless Multi-Robot Trajectory Planning using Linear Spatial Separations discusses Task Planning.
RLSS: Real-time, Decentralized, Cooperative, Networkless Multi-Robot Trajectory Planning using Linear Spatial Separations uses Active-Set Method for Quadratic Programming.
